subject: Are you standing with her?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
The next phase | Friend --

I want to give you a quick update to make sure we're all on the same page.

Together, we’ve built an insurmountable lead in pledged delegates, we’ve won more votes than any other candidate in either party -- and you got us through our most recent fundraising deadline of the primary with flying colors.

Here's what that means: We only need to secure 70 more delegates to lock this thing up for good, and best of all, it should only be a few days before that happens.

Once we do, we head into the next phase of this race -- and that's going to be a little different than what we've done before, even for those of us who have worked on a lot of campaigns in the past. Donald Trump isn't normal. He isn't going to run a normal campaign. And even though each time he pulls a stunt, it will reinforce the fact that he's temperamentally unfit to be our next president, it will also dominate the way reporters talk about this race, the way that voters understand this election, and the focus of people on this campaign.

All of which ... is a challenge.

But we're going to challenge Donald Trump and his campaign. He's not going to build a grassroots organizing program to reach voters at their doors -- but that's exactly how this campaign is spending its time. He doesn't think that data is important (which is literally a thing he says in interviews). We, uhm, disagree -- and ground every decision that we make in the best science we can find. And most importantly, we're going to rebut every ugly, divisive argument he makes every time he opens his dumb mouth.

And I'm 100 percent confident in our ability to do all those things because we're going to do them with you.

**So this is the part where I'm going to make a concrete ask: Before we lock up the nomination and move into the general, we're making sure that Hillary has a chance to see who has been standing with her. Chip in to get your name on that list (and to get a free sticker) before it’s too late!** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2NDYzNzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwMzkwMjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

name: The Briefing, HillaryClinton.com
subject: This week on The Briefing: The truth about "Trump University"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
What a week, guys | _Welcome to the Briefing, where we stay up-to-date on the latest from the Trump campaign. Today we’re talking about Trump University. Want more? Sign up for the Briefing[here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU2NDY3MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNDExMTI4S0&mt=2&rj=ODIwNDExMTI4S0&rt=0)._

Friend --

This week, documents from a fraud lawsuit against Trump University were made public -- so I’d like to take you through some of the top lines.

In theory, Trump University was an educational course that would teach customers how to be successful real estate investors.

In reality, it was a marketing scam -- or as one former employee put it in a newly-public testimony, a “fraudulent scheme” that “preyed upon the elderly and uneducated to separate them from their money.”

This is complicated, so let’s take a look at it point-by-point:

* **When Trump University was founded in 2005, Donald attached his name -- and his money -- whole-heartedly.** He featured prominently in ads offering customers the chance to follow his path to unspecified wealth. “He had very good and substantive input,” the former Trump University president said of Trump in 2012. Trump University was seriously Trump’s University.
* **The institution existed to swindle money from people and benefit Trump’s bottom line -- up to $35,000 at a time.** In the testimony just made public, one Trump University sales manager recounted an instance in which he tried to advise a pair of potential customers away from purchasing an expensive package of seminars when he learned that they were financially unstable and would be using a combination of disability payments and a high-interest loan to cover the cost.

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2NDY3MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNDExMTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

* **The internal company manuals, referred to as “playbooks”, instructed employees to collect sensitive personal information about potential customers,** such as “are they a single parent of three children that may need money for food? Or are they a middle-aged commuter that is tired of traveling for 2 hours to work each day?” -- and then use that information to sell them on an expensive program.
* All these documents make it clear that Trump University specifically targeted and preyed upon people who could least afford it, and **Donald Trump made money on the whole endeavor**.

At this point, it's obvious that this kind of scam is a big part of how Donald Trump made how ever much money he has. It's part of a pattern. And as this campaign unfolds, I suspect we're going to see more and more examples to prove this point.

And every time we learn about another example of fraud from Trump, we're going to need your help to get the word out -- **sign up for The Briefing for the latest facts about this race so you’re always ready with the truth about Trump:**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2NDY3MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNDExMTI4S0&mt=2&rj=ODIwNDExMTI4S0&rt=0) Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

body:

Friend --

With our office opening events coming up this weekend, we wanted to make sure you saw this. Please stop by!

Thanks,

Team Bullock

_\---- Original Message ----
From: Eric Hyers
Subject: grand opening_

Friend,

It's full steam ahead. Montana's primary elections are next Tuesday which means we are just a week away from kicking off the general election campaign. To get ready, Steve and Lt. Gov. Mike Cooney are going to be crisscrossing the state this weekend opening field offices and rallying supporters.

We're hard at work building a top-notch grassroots operation to re-elect Steve and win victories up and down the ballot -- and we're counting on you to be a part of it. **Check out the times and locations and click to RSVP below to join Steve and Mike on their statewide tour.**

We hope you'll stop in to see Steve, meet the field organizer for your community and join in the energy and enthusiasm it's going to take to win this November!

**[Bozeman:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Pqlno%2B2EzyUWtl7yE4f8ajK88fB%2FPO%2F1) **Friday at 5 PM

**[Billings](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oAr3YwRX7%2BYC8XYPme7FejK88fB%2FPO%2F1) **Saturday at 9 AM

**[Great Falls:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gKzTyjlRu5P8XQBjVTuPUjK88fB%2FPO%2F1) **Saturday at 3 PM

**[Butte:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=79IbjvhpIktyDI%2F99z9McjK88fB%2FPO%2F1) **Sunday at 3 PM

**[Helena:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ii20U9vQs%2FCtJ4pvPThSADK88fB%2FPO%2F1) **Monday at 5:15 PM

Offices in [ **Missoula**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tCzuUQMtDD7ryz5zodXrvDK88fB%2FPO%2F1) and [**Kalispell**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wMUUpa45Np9UdSI4OJqdfTK88fB%2FPO%2F1) will be opening shortly; sign up now to receive updates.

Looking forward to seeing everyone,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

P.S. We'll continue to open offices throughout the summer so if you don't see a location close to you, we'll be sure to keep you posted about future field HQ's.

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Stop bankrolling Trump's hate
body:
---
Dear Activist, On July 18, Republicans will gather in Cleveland to nominate Donald Trump as their Presidential candidate, ignoring his racism, sexism, and xenophobia. Why would any corporation want to endorse Trump's hate speech? Coca-Cola and Microsoft have backed away from their support, but Google, Facebook and Twitter are still all in. [**Please join our friends at CREDO Action in telling these companies to stop bankrolling Trump's hate.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126201MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03) Thanks for all you do! Bob Fertik

| | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126202MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
---
**[Stop bankrolling Trump's hate](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126203MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)** _Tell companies sponsoring or considering sponsorship of the Republican National Convention:_
**"Ensure that you do not help provide a platform for Donald Trump's harmful and bigoted rhetoric by pledging not to sponsor the Republican National Convention if Donald Trump is the Republican nominee."** Add your name: | [ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126204MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
---
Dear Friend,
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126205MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
---
Here we are. Donald Trump, whose campaign is rooted in racism, xenophobia and misogyny, is about to become the Republican nominee for president. Trump's astonishing rise to power can, in part, be attributed to a media establishment that has given him a free pass — by both refusing to label his rhetoric as bigoted, dangerous and hateful and by lavishing him with free media and attention around the clock.
As we approach the Republican National Convention (RNC) in July, **we run the risk that corporate sponsorship of Trump's coronation will not only give Trump another free pass, but a stamp of approval that will help sanitize and normalize his hate.**
[**Tell corporations: No stamp of approval for Trump's hate. Click here to sign the petition.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126206MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
CREDO activists have been working with our friends at ColorOfChange, as well as with other progressive allies, **to pressure corporations to disassociate their brands from the RNC and Trump's hate.** We've already had major progress with Coca-Cola and Microsoft.1, 2 But while there are reports that some corporations are becoming increasingly nervous about sponsoring a Trump-led convention, other companies, like Google, Facebook and Twitter, have decided to put their stamps of approval on Trump's divisive and bigoted platform.3
**It's important for companies to be reminded that sponsorship of a Trump-led convention helps legitimize and normalize Trump's hate.** The platform they will be funding and helping to champion includes:
> * Trump's characterization of Mexican immigrants as rapists and criminals; Trump's proposal to ban Muslims, including U.S. citizens, from entering the United States;
> * Trump's rhetoric encouraging his supporters to target protesters at his rallies with violence and his justification and endorsement of the violence his supporters commit;
> * Trump's consistent misogyny and his commitment to end abortion access for women, and
> * Trump's threat that there will be riots if he gets the most votes but does not win the Republican nomination.
>

**It is irresponsible and dangerous for corporations like Google and Facebook to promote Trump's hate by sponsoring the Republican convention.** We need to ramp up the pressure to get them to reconsider their decisions and to make sure that any company considering supporting the RNC backs away. Can you add your voice today?
[**Tell corporations: Pledge not to sponsor a Trump-led Republican convention. Click here to sign the petition.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126207MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
CNN recently reported that a number of high profile Republican politicians are considering skipping the convention because they're "fearful of a potential melee in Cleveland this summer."4 **If the Republican convention is too divisive and violent for Republican leaders to show up, then there is no reason corporations should be sponsoring it.**
Now is the right time to make clear that companies have a choice: **either stand up for diversity and inclusion and back away from Trump's hate, or publicly align their brands with Trump's toxic candidacy.** We know that corporate leaders won't act unless they know that hundreds of thousands of people expect them to do the right thing. Can you help increase the pressure today?
**Tell corporations: Pledge not to sponsor a Trump-led Republican convention. Click the link below to sign the petition:**
[**http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Divest_Trump_dems/**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126208MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
Thanks for standing up to Trump's racism, misogyny and xenophobia,
Heidi Hess, Senior Campaign Manager
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126209MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)
Add your name:
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126210MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)

_References:_
1. Jonathan Martin and Maggie Haberman, "[Corporations Grow Nervous About Participating in Republican Convention](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126211MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)," New York Times, March 30, 2016.
2. Nicholas Confessore, "[Microsoft Will Not Donate Money to Republicans' Convention](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126212MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)," New York Times, April 29, 2016.
3. Mark Trujillo, "[Facebook, Twitter taking part in GOP convention despite anti-Trump pressure](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126213MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)," The Hill, May 5, 2016.
4. Manu Raju and Deirdre Walsh, "[Top Republicans may skip GOP convention](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00126214MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-03)," CNN, April 12, 2016.

subject: Your Campaign Update
body:
| | | Your Weekly Campaign Update
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0c42bdc4da&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| Phil and Team Scott continued on the 14-county Green Flag Tour this week, and enjoyed meeting Vermonters around the state for numerous Memorial Day celebrations. A few of this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign are below.

**LEARNING MORE FROM VERMONTERS AND VERMONT BUSINESSES**
Our mobile campaign office “Blizzard” made stops in Franklin, Grand Isle, and Addison Counties this week as part of our 14-county _Green Flag Tour._ Phil toured local businesses and listened to business owners and employees to learn more about how state government can make it easier and more affordable to live, work and do business in the state we love.

In **Franklin County** , Phil’s stops included tours of Swanton Lumber, Precision Tools and Handy Toyota. He also met with dairy farmers at the St. Albans Co-op and assured them that when he is Governor, traditional farming will once again have a seat at the table!

Photo Credit: Phil Scott For Vermont [Facebook Page](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c92d79c051&e=19cebfe173)
Phil also spent time speaking with residents of **Grand Isle County** about the economy, tourism and our beautiful Lake Champlain.
Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
After that he swung by Phoenix Feeds, Maple Landmark Products, Vermont Soap, and Vermont Tree Goods in **Addison County**. Former Governor Jim Douglas – one of Phil’s earliest and biggest supporters – also joined us.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
Keep an eye out for us in your neck of the woods! Next week Phil and Team Scott will be roaring into [Windsor County](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6bd994ae9d&e=19cebfe173) and [Chittenden County](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=948ed92c06&e=19cebfe173). In addition, Phil will participate in the [Vermont Business Roundtable Forum](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4e7d13d0c9&e=19cebfe173), [Bennington County Forum](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c23ade70d2&e=19cebfe173), and the [5th Annual Water Quality Conference](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=524acd9437&e=19cebfe173). Check out our full listing of events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b2fa3c7a66&e=19cebfe173).
***
**INSPIRING LAWMAKERS TO FOCUS ON BILLS THAT PROMOTE JOBS**
Phil knows that to compete in a 21st century marketplace we need a qualified workforce that’s skilled in science, technology, engineering and manufacturing (STEM). **The stronger the talent of Vermont workers, the stronger our businesses will be.** So investing in pro-growth areas such as STEM education is a great of example of what Phil meant when - as Sen. Peg Flory, R-Rutland told VT Digger - **Phil instructed legislators to consider ways to promote job opportunities as they worked on their bills in committee.**

Sen. Flory noted that when Vermont Technical College and Castleton University requested funding to help renovate and upgrade their STEM labs, the Legislature recognized that this is exactly the type of investment that could improve the economy and support Vermont business.
“There appears to be a job market, but the kids need to have upgraded lab equipment in order to be ready to take those jobs. **So we thought it was a wise investment for jobs** ,” Flory said. Read the full story from VT Digger by clicking [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=19eed241fe&e=19cebfe173), and read more about Phil’s approach to creating jobs, retaining businesses and supporting pro-growth investments [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=70e7224ff2&e=19cebfe173).
*******
**HONORING THOSE WHO MADE THE ULTIMATE SACRIFICE ON MEMORIAL DAY **
This past Memorial Day weekend, while Team Scott urged Vermonters to celebrate freedom and enjoy the family, friends and the outdoors in our beautiful state, we also worked hard to highlight the meaning of this important holiday: honoring our servicemen and women who gave their lives in service to our country. It is their service, and sacrifice – and the service of all veterans – that allows us to be here today, safe and sound. We can never do enough to honor them.

**IT’S PARADE SEASON!**
Memorial Day weekend does mark the unofficial start of the summer – and for campaigns, parade season! And, we think it’s safe to say that no one does campaigns quite like Team Scott!

Phil greeted Vermonters in the Essex and Vergennes Memorial Day Parades. We had a great turnout to show support for our soldiers, vets and those who made the ultimate sacrifice. Thanks to all who participated.

We’d love to have you join us in a parade. If you want to join us in our parade-within-a-parade, please contact [tracy@philscott.org](mailto:tracy@philscott.org) \-- we will be at the Dairy Days parade in Enosburg on Saturday and Independence Day is right around the corner!

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT and Phil Scott For Vermont [Facebook Page](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c196e03368&e=19cebfe173)

***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Phil: As Governor, the economy will be THE priority_**
“I’m running for governor to make the economy and affordability not just _a_ priority, but _the_ priority. I think that restoring the lack of faith and trust that we have in government, following through on what you say you’re going to do, being there, and being predictable is something that’s important to the economy and its important to the citizens of Vermont.” (Source: WDEV’s Open Mike: [Full Interview](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=26a5aea611&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil Scott is right for Vermont_**
“It [is] very clear the only candidate who is right for Vermont is Phil Scott.”- Nicole Citro, Essex Junction (Source: Burlington Free Press: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=574b7e116c&e=19cebfe173)) ***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

_Stowe Reporter: Stowe legislator is unopposed_
“If lack of opposition is an endorsement, Heidi Scheuermann is on a roll,” said the Stowe Reporter this week. We think it is an endorsement of Heidi’s commitment to fighting to stop irresponsible legislation as part of the minority party alongside Phil, and Phil’s glad to have her endorsement as well. Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=14d6665391&e=19cebfe173) and read about the additional Republican legislators who endorsed Phil for Governor alongside Heidi, [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=811f3720c7&e=19cebfe173).

Thanks to everyone that came out to events and participated in meetings this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b22b306aed&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5da3f14f73&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

name: BernieSanders.com
body:
#
Bernie Supporter -
A whopping total of 694 pledged delegates are up for grabs on Tuesday, and - especially given the latest polling out of California - we believe we have a good chance of winning a big majority of them. **But we need your help to do that.**
Thousands of in-state volunteers are hitting the streets in these final days to find Bernie voters and get them to the polls. But they just can't knock the door of every voter we need to contact.
So our task this weekend is pretty simple: **call every single Bernie supporter we can in the upcoming states, and make sure they have a plan to vote onTuesday**. Can Bernie count on you to volunteer a couple hours of your time?
**[Yes, I'll make some calls this weekend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160603 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160603")**
If you've never called voters for Bernie before, **now is the time to take the plunge.** Calling on our Bernie Dialer is easy; you just need a computer or a tablet, and a phone. We provide a simple script for you to follow, connect you directly to the targeted voters, and we have dedicated volunteers standing by on livechat to help out if you run into any problems.
Our plan is to go into the Democratic convention in Philadelphia with as many votes, delegates and states as possible. From there, the superdelegates will have to consider who is the best candidate to take on Donald Trump - **and the polls consistently show Bernie is that candidate.**
So don't let this opportunity slip by. Our collective efforts this weekend have the potential to shock the political establishment and show the billionaire class that we've had enough of super-PAC-funded politics as usual. Your involvement will help write a pivotal chapter in American political history, so **we're asking you to[step up and commit as much volunteer time as you can.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160603 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160603")**
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

| Dear Friend -- Have you heard the big news? President Obama is coming to Seattle on June 24th. He'll be the guest of honor at a dinner supporting our campaign -- can you make it? Under President Obama's leadership, our nation's progress has been staggering. We've turned our economy around and fought to level the playing field for all families. We've reclaimed our role as a global leader in the fight against climate change and provided access to affordable health care for millions of Americans. From LGBTQ rights to college affordability, President Obama's remarkable record of accomplishments will not soon be forgotten. A few good reasons to stop Donald Trump: | Friend --

Yesterday in San Diego, Hillary gave a speech in which she kind of said what we've all been thinking:

"Donald Trump’s ideas aren’t just different—they are dangerously incoherent. They’re not even really ideas—just a series of bizarre rants, personal feuds, and outright lies. He is not just unprepared—he is temperamentally unfit to hold an office that requires knowledge, stability, and immense responsibility."

If you agree that Donald Trump isn't fit to be our next president, **[add your name right now](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2NTY0NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjM4NzI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**.

The fact is that Trump's ideas -- when he's got them -- are downright dangerous.

He's raised the prospect of sending tens of thousands of troops into another war.

He's threatened to withdraw from some of our strongest alliances -- even though that could increase international instability.

His plan to ban 1.5 billion Muslims from entering our country plays right into the hands of extremist groups like ISIS.

We can't let this man into the Oval Office. His beliefs and ideas are antithetical to what truly makes America already great.

They’re not even really ideas—just a series of bizarre rants, personal feuds, and outright lies. He is not just unprepared—he is temperamentally unfit to hold an office that requires knowledge, stability, and immense responsibility." If you agree that Donald Trump isn't fit to be our next president, . The fact is that Trump's ideas -- when he's got them -- are downright dangerous. He's raised the prospect of sending tens of thousands of troops into another war. He's threatened to withdraw from some of our strongest alliances -- even though that could increase international instability. His plan to ban 1.5 billion Muslims from entering our country plays right into the hands of extremist groups like ISIS. We can't let this man into the Oval Office.
